sizing: REAL LIVE FLEET: KZ 3 MNQ, ORB 1 MNQ, LSF 1 MNQ (not the inflated 3-MNQ-all of v2)

pool_provenance.KZ: 1-MINUTE faithful backtest of live AUGXMENTED_NQ_1M_KZ engine, SMT-ON via Databento MES front-month (continuous, volume-roll, 100% aligned to nq_1m_db). RegimeStrategy at 1m, min_score 13 / TP 1.0-1.8-2.8 / max_hold 120 / hard_stop 2.5 ATR / KZ London 03-05 + NY 09:30-11:30 ET / Variant-C yfinance NQ=F 200SMA shifted-1d. 1073 tr, WR 59%, PF 0.88, net -$8,585/2yr @ 3 MNQ -> KZ is STILL A LOSER even with real SMT. baked 2 x mult 1.5 = 3 MNQ. SMT resolves the open caveat: SMT-off was PF 0.83/-$11.1k, SMT-on PF 0.88/-$8.6k -> SMT helps marginally but does NOT rescue KZ (OOS PF 0.84). The 5m CSV (234tr PF 1.30) was a timeframe artifact.
pool_provenance.ORB: backtest_orb_8am.run_variant Mode A / clean_bias ON / range OFF / zone 08:45-09:00 ET / TP 4R (matches live orb_paper_bot). 533 tr, PF 1.90. Limit-at-zone-mid fill, no lookahead. 1 MNQ.
pool_provenance.LSF: rebuilt from london_sweep_fvg_paper_bot logic, UNCAPPED-dedup (356 tr vs live ~287; accepted as marginal/approximate ~$120-300/yr, barely moves baseline). 1 MNQ. PF 1.12.

sim_rules.floor_model: Two independent floors: (1) -$800 DAILY blocker clips day P&L at -$800 and counts a halt (SURVIVABLE, account continues next day); (2) $48,000 MLL is a HARD PERMANENT kill from day 1 (balance <= $48K anywhere = account dead, removed from any-5 pool). Terminal outcomes: pass, fail_mll, fail_time. Halts are a metric only, not terminal.

notes: AWAITING SIGN-OFF. Durable pool path. v2 kept as deprecated record.
